fields.name: link_id
fields.description: Required. Foreign key to road_links. The link that the segment is located on.

fields.name: ref_node_id
fields.description: Required. Foreign key to node where distance is 0.

fields.name: start_lr
fields.description: Required. Distance from `ref_node_id` in short_length units.

fields.name: free_speed
fields.description: Optional. Free flow speed, units defined by config file

fields.name: lanes
fields.description: Optional. Number of lanes in the direction of travel (must be consistent with link lanes + lanes added).

fields.name: l_lanes_added
fields.description: Optional. # of lanes added on the left of the road link (negative indicates a lane drop).

fields.name: r_lanes_added
fields.description: Optional. # of lanes added on the right of the road link (negative indicates a lane drop).

fields.name: bike_facility
fields.description: Optional. Type of bike facility along the segment.

fields.name: ped_facility
fields.description: Optional. Type of pedestrian accommodation along the segment

fields.name: parking
fields.description: Optional. Type of parking along the segment.

fields.name: allowed_uses
fields.description: Optional. Set of allowed uses that should appear in either the use_definition or use_group tables; comma-separated.

fields.name: toll
fields.description: Optional.  Toll on the segment, in currency units.

fields.name: jurisdiction
fields.description: Optional. Optional.  Owner/operator of the segment.

fields.name: row_width
fields.description: Optional. Width (short_length units) of the entire right-of-way (both directions).

name: segment.schema.json
description: A portion of a link defined by `link_id`,`ref_node_id`, `start_lr`, and `end_lr`. Values in the segment will override they value specified in the link table. When one segment is fully contained within another, its value prevails.
